ticket.title: Make power(a, b) handle negative bases correctly
acceptance_criteria: `power(-2, 3)` returns -8 (current stub returns 8 because of the abs() bug).
`power(-2, 4)` returns 16 (even exponent on negative base stays positive).
A pytest test `test_power_negative_base` lives in `tests/test_calculator.py` and pins both behaviours.

plan.title: Fix power() for negative bases
plan.detail: Replace the abs(a)**b stub with sign-aware logic

plan.title: Fix power() for negative bases
plan.detail: Add test_power_negative_base covering odd + even exponents

plan.title: Fix power() for negative bases
